title: ANIIDCO Deputy General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO)
short_info: The latest Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Deputy General Manager (Tourism) posts! Published in the official notification, this new recruitment drive offers 1 vacancy for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 40 years (Direct Recruitment) / 56 years (Deputation) age group and possessing a Hotel Management Degree/Diploma or Master’s in Tourism/Hospitality with relevant experience can apply via email on or before 12 June 2026. Find all details about the ANIIDCO Deputy General Manager (Tourism) new vacan

age_limit.details: Direct Recruitment: Maximum 40 years. Deputation: Maximum 56 years (as on 12-06-2026). Age Relaxation: ST & Government servants: 5 years; OBC: 3 years; PwD: 5 years (Group A & B posts), 10 years (Group C posts); ST + PwD: 10 years; OBC + PwD: 8 years (Group A & B)/13 years (Group C); ANIIDCO contract employees: subject to conditions (not over-age at initial appointment). No relaxation for SSCT/Adhoc/Contract/DRM of A&N Administration in ANIIDCO.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma OR Master in Tourism Administration / Master in Hospitality Management
qualification.details: For Direct Recruitment: At least 3-year Hotel Management Degree/Diploma after 12th standard (preferably from IHM) OR Master in Tourism Administration / Master in Hospitality Management or equivalent. Minimum 2 years experience in managerial position dealing with tourism activities in a Tourism Organization / Hotel. For Deputation: Officers from Central/State Govt/UT/PSU/Autonomous bodies/Tourism Dev. Corporations holding analogous post on regular basis OR 5 years regular service in Level-9 (Rs.53100-167800) OR 7 years regular service in Level-7 (Rs.44900-142400).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIDCO Deputy General Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIDCO Deputy General Manager (Tourism) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy General Manager (Tourism) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Deputy General Manager (Tourism) post in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands Integrated Development Corporation (ANIIDCO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy General Manager (Tourism) post?
faq.answer: For direct recruitment, a 3-year Hotel Management Degree/Diploma after 12th standard or a Master's in Tourism Administration/Hospitality Management is required. For deputation, candidates must hold an analogous post or have specific years of service in designated pay levels.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy General Manager (Tourism) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in Level-11, which ranges from ₹ 67,700 to ₹ 2,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: For direct recruitment, the maximum age limit is 40 years. For deputation, the maximum age limit is 56 years as of 12th June 2026. Age relaxations are applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply via email by sending their complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Deputy General Manager (Tourism) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications, marks, and experience, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation, meaning it is for officers on deputation from other government departments or organizations.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
